items.title: The Mountain Goats Follow Up “Candlebox” By Teasing Shows With Candlebox
items.summary: A couple of days ago, the Mountain Goats released "Candlebox," the latest single from their upcoming album Days. It's about a young band in the early '90s who thinks their whole life is about to change because they're heading out on tour with quasi-alt-rock hitmakers Candlebox, and it fucking rules. Candlebox are still a band; they did not leave that life far behind.

items.title: The Linda Lindas Announce New Album Gotta Get Out: Hear  “Closer” (Feat. Hayley Williams)
items.summary: A month ago, former teen phenoms the Linda Lindas made the leap to major-label status, announcing a deal with Warner/Reprise and releasing the new single "Burning Out." That was, of course, a precursor to an album announcement, which has arrived today. The Linda Lindas will release Gotta Get Out at the end of August, and they've lined up one of their many famous friends to join them on the next single.

items.title: Confidence Man – “Young London”
items.summary: Does the name Bomb The Bass mean anything to you? Because it means something to me. When I was nine years old, my family moved to London for a year — 1988 to 1989, right in time for the Second Summer Of Love.

items.title: Jack White invites Twin Temple to open for him after they were dropped from Charley Crockett shows
items.summary: Self-proclaimed “Satanic doo-wop” duo Twin Temple were scheduled to open two shows on outlaw country artist Charley Crockett‘s upcoming tour, but they’ve since been removed from the shows. In a statement on their Instagram, they wrote: Today we were informed that Charley Crockett has decided to remove Twin Temple from his upcoming shows next week...

items.title: Watch Kelley Stoltz’s trippy animated video for drummer tribute “Watts Moon Starr”
items.summary: “Watts Moon Starr” is off of Kelley Stoltz’s great new album ‘If You Don’t Know Me, Buy Now!’

items.title: The Linda Lindas announce new LP ‘Gotta Get Out,’ share “Closer” ft. Hayley Williams
items.summary: It’s their third album and first since signing to Reprise/Warner.

items.title: LeFrak Center’s Roller Skating Summer Concert Series Turns Prospect Park Into Brooklyn’s Newest Live Music Destination
items.summary: Live music and roller skating will once again lock arms in the heart of Brooklyn when the LeFrak Center at Lakeside rolls out its 2026 Roller Skating Summer Concert Series. Prospect Park will transform into a one-of-a-kind venue for these seven-shows, which kick off July 24 and promise concertgoers the chance to catch rising artists, […]

items.title: Liquid Canvas Brings Music Passion Home by Turning Your TV into a Gallery
items.summary: For true music fans who live for those seminal live music moments of elation, Liquid Canvas allows you to bring that feeling right into your home all year long. The app technology shares your music experiences and expressions of fan art on your own TV. Think of it as the next evolution of band posters […]
